allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''pdf-parse''\).then\(m => console.log\(''OK, pdf-parse loaded:'', typeof m.default\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''pdf-parse''\).then\(m => { const p = new m.PDFParse\(\); console.log\(''methods:'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(k=>k!==''constructor''\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''pdf-parse''\).then\(m => { const p = new m.PDFParse\(\); console.log\(''methods:'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(k => k !== ''constructor''\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''FAIL:'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse/lib/pdf-parse.js''\); console.log\(''OK, type:'', typeof p\)")
